title: StudyGuide
description: One-page study guide for a single unit

theme.description: One sentence capturing the unit's core theme

title.description: Short (3–6 word) label shown in the accordion header.

detail.description: Full concept explanation. Inline math uses $...$ KaTeX delimiters.

core_concepts.description: Each concept has a short title and a full detail string.

katex_string.description: Valid KaTeX string — rendered in displayMode block. Verified by Checker before integration.

description.description: Plain English: what the formula does and when to use it. No jargon. Required for math subjects (phases 9, 10, 12).

example.description: Worked example showing the formula in action. Supports $...$ inline KaTeX delimiters. Required for math subjects (phases 9, 10, 12).

data.description: For table: {headers: string[], rows: string[][]}. For chart: Chart.js ChartConfiguration.

exam_tip.description: One sentence on what College Board emphasizes from this unit. Inline math uses $...$ KaTeX delimiters.
